iterations.theme: Cijelo svjedočanstvo bračnog para Mare i Mije: Od susreta do obiteljskog života i vjere
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast forms a cohesive narrative of the couple's journey, from their initial meeting and individual spiritual transformations to their marital challenges, family life, and shared faith. Given the total duration of 55 minutes, a single comprehensive iteration is the most logical structure to maintain thematic integrity, as splitting it into two would result in at least one block significantly outside the requested 35-45 minute range.
